summary: Now Spinning + Vinyl Mood merge feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Composer bar has exactly 3 buttons (Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO). No Vinyl Mood button. Now Spinning modal includes mood grid with 12 moods. Mood selection changes modal background/button color/text/placeholder. Posts with mood show mood pill badge in feed. Posts without mood show no badge. 'Sunday Morning' renamed to 'Good Morning'.
passed_tests: Frontend: Composer bar has exactly 3 buttons: Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO
Frontend: No 'Vinyl Mood' button exists in the composer bar
Frontend: Now Spinning modal has Record dropdown (required), Track input, 'how does it feel?' mood grid, Note textarea, and Post button
Frontend: Now Spinning modal shows 12 mood tiles with emojis including 'Good Morning' (not 'Sunday Morning')

Frontend: Selecting a mood (Late Night) changes modal background to purple, button color, button text to 'Post Now Spinning · 🕯️ Late Night', and note placeholder to 'what are you listening to at this hour?'

Frontend: Selecting a mood (Good Morning) changes modal background to warm cream/yellow, button text to 'Post Now Spinning · ☀️ Good Morning', placeholder to 'slow mornings, good records, nowhere to be...'
Frontend: Deselecting a mood reverts modal to default styling (button: 'Post Now Spinning', placeholder: 'add a note...')
Frontend: Post button is disabled until a record is selected, but does NOT require a mood
Frontend: Successfully posting a Now Spinning with a mood stores the mood on the post
Frontend: Now Spinning posts with a mood show a mood pill badge on the feed (e.g., '🧸 Cozy Evening')
Frontend: Now Spinning posts without a mood show no mood badge (verified with TEST_Trade_Record_5)
Frontend: Legacy VINYL_MOOD posts still render correctly with VinylMoodCard component
Backend: POST /api/composer/now-spinning accepts optional 'mood' field
Backend: POST /api/composer/now-spinning works without mood (null)
Backend: POST /api/composer/now-spinning with 'Good Morning' mood works correctly
Backend: Posts returned from /api/feed include 'mood' field for NOW_SPINNING posts
Backend: Posts returned from /api/explore include 'mood' field
Frontend: New Haul modal still works correctly (has store input, Discogs search, caption, submit button)
Frontend: ISO modal still works correctly (has artist*, album*, pressing, budget, caption, submit button)
Backend: POST /api/composer/new-haul still works
Backend: POST /api/composer/iso still works
Backend: Legacy POST /api/composer/vinyl-mood endpoint still works for backward compatibility
seed_data_creation: Created test Now Spinning posts with and without mood for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Now Spinning modal has been merged with Vinyl Mood feature. 3 composer buttons: Now Spinning (data-testid='composer-chip-now_spinning'), New Haul (data-testid='composer-chip-new_haul'), ISO (data-testid='composer-chip-iso'). No Vinyl Mood button. Now Spinning modal mood tiles: mood-late-night, mood-good-morning, mood-rainy-day, mood-road-trip, mood-golden-hour, mood-deep-focus, mood-party-mode, mood-lazy-afternoon, mood-melancholy, mood-upbeat-vibes, mood-cozy-evening, mood-workout. Mood pill badge: data-testid='mood-pill-badge'. Legacy VINYL_MOOD posts still supported via VinylMoodCard component. PostTypeBadge receives 'mood' prop for NOW_SPINNING posts.
